noveltyJustification: Distinguished existing content addressing and deterministic ranking from conditional artifact-cache and vector-representation improvements.

summary: Binary or in-database vector representation can remove JSON transfer/parsing; Rust is not necessary.
A shared content-addressed model/artifact cache is useful only once local inference or multiple consumers create large reusable artifacts.

reason: Existing bounded TypeScript ranking is deterministic and below materiality/scale gates; Rust adds strict numeric parity risk.
